# MoE / Routing PRs

Optimization recipe: Separate routing, permutation, top-k, and expert GEMM costs; keep tail-token and expert-layout tests attached to the idea.

NCU first look: Tensor pipe %, SM imbalance, branch divergence, L2 traffic, permutation traffic, and synchronization stalls.

## Inspection Questions

- Does the PR optimize routing/permutation or the expert GEMM itself?
- Which expert-count, token-count, and group-size cases need replay?
